name: sqlitedata-swift
description: SQLiteData skills — Point-Free's fast, lightweight SwiftData replacement powered by SQLite (GRDB) with CloudKit sync support
author: sitapix

skills.name: sqlitedata-swift
skills.description: Use when working with SQLiteData — routes to core patterns, CloudKit sync, API reference, or troubleshooting skills and agents.

skills.name: sqlitedata-swift-core
skills.description: SQLiteData core patterns — @Table models, @FetchAll/@FetchOne/@Fetch property wrappers, FetchKeyRequest, database setup, migrations, query building.

skills.name: sqlitedata-swift-diag
skills.description: SQLiteData troubleshooting — common errors, migration failures, sync issues, query problems, constraint violations.
